headline: New Wildfire Lawsuit and Grid Investments Might Change The Case For Investing In PG&E (PCG)
summary: In June 2026, PG&E faced a new wildfire-related lawsuit over the June 17, 2024 Sites Fire while continuing to invest heavily in grid upgrades, renewables, and battery storage projects across California. This combination of fresh legal exposure and ongoing infrastructure and clean-energy spending highlights the tension between PG&E’s risk profile and its modernization efforts. Next, we’ll examine how this new wildfire lawsuit, alongside PG&E’s continued grid and storage investments, may...
